_comment: Copy this file to paths.json and fill in your own paths. paths.json is gitignored.
_comment_participants: List of participant/subject IDs (subfolder names under data_dir) to include. null = use all subfolders.
_comment_encoder_type: Encoder architecture to use. Built-in: 'simclr_pt'. Register custom types in encoder.py.
_comment_dataset_config: Path to the dataset JSON config (relative to repo root or absolute).
_comment_hparams_config: Path to the hyperparameter JSON config.
_comment_paths: data_dir must be absolute OR relative to repo root. working_dir, simclr_path, figs_dir can be relative to repo root.
_comment_encoder_paths: Map encoder key -> path to .pt weights file. Keys must match the 'encoders' section in your dataset config. Paths are relative to repo root or absolute. Example with two encoders: {"body": "./models/body.pt", "wrist": "./models/wrist.pt"}
